Who We Are

Strategic Minds.
Creative Solutions.

About DAGHOSA GLOBAL SERVICES LTD

At DAGHOSA GLOBAL SERVICES LTD, we are dedicated to delivering innovative, cutting-edge solutions tailored to meet your business needs. Our expertise spans a broad spectrum of professional services designed to elevate your brand and boost your growth:

  • Strategic Communication: Crafting compelling narratives that resonate.
  • Public Relations: Building lasting relationships with your client or audience.
  • Advertising: Creating impactful campaigns that capture attention.
  • Digital Marketing: Leveraging online platforms to drive engagement and conversions.
  • Business Analysis & Forecasting: Providing insights to make informed decisions.
  • Upskilling & Branding: Empowering your team while defining your unique identity.
  • Research, Reporting & Professional Writing: Delivering precise and data-driven content.
  • Corporate Anchoring: Making your events memorable and professional.

At DAGHOSA GLOBAL SERVICES LTD, we support our services with advanced technology and a team of skilled professionals. Make DAGHOSA GLOBAL SERVICES LTD your trusted partner. We are committed to excellence and innovation.

Whether you're a startup or an established company, we work closely with you to turn challenges into opportunities.

Join us on this journey to success and experience the difference of strategic, result-driven services.

Our Process

02

Public Relations · 2024

National Brand Repositioning Campaign

Client
Fortune Consumer Ltd
Sector
FMCG
Duration
6 Months
Market
Nigeria

A fast-moving consumer goods brand faced reputational headwinds and declining market share. DAGHOSA GLOBAL SERVICES LTD was engaged to lead a comprehensive repositioning effort — from narrative development to full media rollout. We crafted a new brand story, coordinated press engagements, managed crisis communications, and stewarded stakeholder relationships over a 6-month period.

Key Outcomes

Secured over 40 positive media placements across print, online, and broadcast
Shifted brand sentiment from negative to neutral-positive within 3 months
Recovered 12% market share within the campaign period
Successfully contained two potential crisis narratives before escalation
Media Relations Crisis Comms Brand Strategy Stakeholder Mgmt
Digital Marketing · 2024

Social Growth & Engagement Drive

Client
Apex Partners
Sector
Financial Services
Duration
90 Days
Market
Nigeria

A B2B financial services firm had a dormant social presence and no structured content strategy. We conducted an audience analysis, developed a content calendar, and produced platform-native content across LinkedIn and Twitter/X — with a clear lead generation funnel integrated into the strategy.

Key Outcomes

3× increase in organic engagement across all platforms within 90 days
Generated over 200 qualified leads through targeted content campaigns
Grew LinkedIn following by 340% from a standing start
Reduced cost-per-lead by 28% compared to previous paid efforts
Social Media Content Strategy Lead Gen
Advertising · 2023

Product Launch Campaign — Pan-African Reach

Client
NextGen Brands
Sector
Consumer Goods
Duration
4 Months
Markets
5 African Countries

We conceptualised and managed the full advertising rollout for a new consumer product entering five African markets simultaneously. This involved developing culturally resonant creative concepts, coordinating media buying across TV, OOH, radio, and digital, and managing localised campaign adaptations for each market.

Key Outcomes

Achieved 78% unaided brand awareness in target markets within 2 months of launch
Campaign delivered 15% above projected reach across all media channels
Coordinated seamless localisation across 5 distinct cultural contexts
Product sold out in two markets within 6 weeks of launch
Campaign Creative Media Buying Multi-Market
Strategy · 2023

Corporate Communication Audit & Restructure

Client
Public Institution
Sector
Government
Duration
3 Months
Scope
Internal & External

A government-affiliated institution was experiencing inconsistent messaging, siloed communications, and weakening public trust. We performed a full audit of internal memos, public-facing content, and media positioning, then delivered a restructured communications framework with clear protocols, key message libraries, and spokesperson guidelines.

Key Outcomes

Delivered a comprehensive 60-page communications framework and style guide
Reduced internal miscommunication incidents by 40% within 60 days of implementation
Improved media sentiment scores from 42% to 71% positive over 6 months post-delivery
Trained 30 senior staff across communications protocols
Comms Audit Framework Design Institutional
PR · 2022

Executive Thought Leadership Programme

Client
Executive (Private)
Sector
Cross-Industry
Duration
12 Months
Region
West Africa

A senior executive sought to establish themselves as a credible thought leader within their industry. We developed a comprehensive programme covering personal brand positioning, regular opinion editorial placements, keynote speech writing, broadcast media training, and strategic press engagements — executed over 12 months.

Key Outcomes

Secured 18 press features and editorial placements across leading regional publications
Executive invited as a keynote speaker at 4 major industry events
Built a LinkedIn presence from zero to 12,000 engaged followers
Recognised by a national business magazine as one of West Africa's top voices in their field
Thought Leadership Media Training Press Placement
